title: 1st IAWEL Student Conference
text:
We are excited to bring you the first IAWEL student conference in September 2026 as part of our welcome week activities. Our theme is Animal Welfare Connections and that is what we want to do, connect the animal welfare change makers of the future.


You can find a list of abstracts from this conference here
You can find a list of blog posts and news from this conference here

title: Launching the IAWEL Student Conference
text:
We are delighted to announce that the first International Animal Welfare Ethics and Law Student Conference will run on the 15th September, 2026.
The conference itself is open to current IAWEL students only, however, we will share the abstract book and abstract presentations shortly.

title: International Animal Welfare Ethics and Law MSc Student Conference
text:
LinkedIn Page
  
  
    
     MSc Webpage
  

  
  
This is the page for the International Animal Welfare Ethics and Law MSc Student Conference.
International Animal Welfare Ethics and Law (or IAWEL) is the part-time distance learning MSc at the Royal (Dick) School of Veterinary Studies at the University of Edinburgh. We launched in 2012, and since then have awarded over 200 MSc students. While many of our dissertation students go on to publish their theses, we wanted a way to celebrate our students amazing achievements, and in 2026, we ran our first IAWEL Student Conference.
